---
title: "Patterns in the Posts"
subtitle: "What 87,146 posts tell you when you stack them up."
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
anchor-sections: false
---

<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.35.2.min.js"></script>

<style>
  .analytics-section { margin: 2.5rem 0 3rem 0; }
  .lookat {
    font-family: "Libre Caslon Text", serif;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    line-height: 1.4;
    color: #0A2540;
    border-left: 4px solid #C9A961;
    padding: 0.4rem 0 0.4rem 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    font-style: italic;
  }
  .panel {
    border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    background: #FBF7EE;
    padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    min-height: 1.5em;
    font-family: "Libre Franklin", sans-serif;
  }
  .panel .title { font-weight: 700; color: #8B1E3F; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
  .panel .item {
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
    padding: 0.4rem 0;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
  }
  .panel .ts { color: #6E5A2A; font-size: 0.78rem; margin-right: 0.6rem; }
  .nickname-surfaces {
    margin: 0.4rem 0 0.8rem 0;
  }
  .nickname-surfaces .surface {
    display: inline-block;
    background: #0A2540;
    color: #F4ECD8;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    margin: 2px 4px 2px 0;
    border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
  }
</style>

## When does he post?

<p class="lookat">Every post since 2009, plotted by hour of the day (Eastern Time) and day of the week. The dark band between 5 AM and 9 AM tells the story.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="clock-heatmap" style="height: 360px;"></div>
  <div id="clock-panel" class="panel" style="display: none;"></div>
</div>

## The storm days

<p class="lookat">Every day, colored by post volume. The bright spots are days he couldn't sleep — hover one to see what set him off.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="storm-calendar" style="height: 420px;"></div>
</div>

## The nickname factory

<p class="lookat">Forty targets, six and a half thousand nicknames. The bar is how often he reached for a label. Click any bar to see what he called them.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="nickname-bars" style="height: 620px;"></div>
  <div id="nickname-panel" class="panel" style="display: none;"></div>
</div>

## Mood by topic, over time

<p class="lookat">VADER sentiment averaged month-by-month. Pick a topic. Below the zero line is angry; above it is upbeat. Crime and the media stay sour; family and rallies stay sunny.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div style="margin-bottom: 0.6rem; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', sans-serif;">
    Topic: <select id="sentiment-theme" style="padding: 4px 8px; font-size: 0.95rem;"></select>
  </div>
  <div id="sentiment-chart" style="height: 380px;"></div>
</div>

## The shouting index

<p class="lookat">How loud is each month? The blue line is the share of words written in ALL CAPS. The red line is exclamation marks per 100 characters. Both spike right around elections.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="lexical-chart" style="height: 380px;"></div>
</div>

## Topics over time — the river

<p class="lookat">Every primary topic, stacked month by month. The total height is the volume of posts; each band's thickness shows how much of the conversation was about that topic. Watch *border* swell in 2018-19 and *courts* take over in 2023-24.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="topic-stream" style="height: 460px;"></div>
</div>

## Most-Trumpiest words, year by year

<p class="lookat">For each year, the words and phrases that make that year *that year* — picked by TF-IDF against every other year. Click a year on the strip to see what defined it.</p>

<div class="analytics-section">
  <div id="tfidf-strip" style="height: 60px; margin-bottom: 1rem;"></div>
  <div id="tfidf-bars" style="height: 420px;"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var NAVY = "#0A2540", GOLD = "#C9A961", RED = "#8B1E3F", CREAM = "#F4ECD8";

  function fmtTs(s) {
    if (!s) return "";
    return s.replace("T", " ").substring(0, 16);
  }

  // ---------- 1. Clock heatmap ----------
  fetch("data/temporal.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (t) {
    var data = [{
      z: t.counts,
      x: t.hours,
      y: t.dow_names,
      type: "heatmap",
      colorscale: [
        [0,    "#F4ECD8"],
        [0.15, "#E8D5A3"],
        [0.4,  "#C9A961"],
        [0.7,  "#8B1E3F"],
        [1,    "#0A2540"]
      ],
      hovertemplate: "%{y}, %{x}:00 ET<br><b>%{z}</b> posts<extra></extra>",
      showscale: true,
      colorbar: { title: "posts", thickness: 12, len: 0.8 }
    }];
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 50, l: 50 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: {
        title: "hour of day (Eastern Time)",
        tickmode: "array",
        tickvals: [0, 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21],
        ticktext: ["12a", "3a", "6a", "9a", "12p", "3p", "6p", "9p"],
        tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" }
      },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("clock-heatmap", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });

    var panel = document.getElementById("clock-panel");
    document.getElementById("clock-heatmap").on("plotly_click", function (ev) {
      var pt = ev.points && ev.points[0];
      if (!pt) return;
      var dowIdx = t.dow_names.indexOf(pt.y);
      var key = dowIdx + "," + pt.x;
      var ids = t.samples[key] || [];
      panel.style.display = "block";
      var hr = pt.x;
      var hrLabel = (hr === 0 ? "12 AM" : hr < 12 ? hr + " AM" : hr === 12 ? "12 PM" : (hr - 12) + " PM");
      var html = '<div class="title">' + pt.y + ", " + hrLabel + " ET — " + pt.z + " posts. A few examples:</div>";
      if (!ids.length) {
        html += '<div class="item">(no samples saved for this bucket)</div>';
      } else {
        ids.forEach(function (id) {
          var meta = t.sample_meta[id];
          if (!meta) return;
          html += '<div class="item"><span class="ts">' + fmtTs(meta.ts) + " · " + meta.platform + '</span>' + meta.text + '</div>';
        });
      }
      panel.innerHTML = html;
    });
  });

  // ---------- 2. Storm calendar ----------
  fetch("data/storm_days.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (s) {
    // Group by year, columns = day-of-year
    var byYear = {};
    s.days.forEach(function (d) {
      var y = d.day.substring(0, 4);
      if (!byYear[y]) byYear[y] = {};
      // day-of-year
      var dt = new Date(d.day + "T00:00:00Z");
      var start = Date.UTC(parseInt(y), 0, 1);
      var doy = Math.floor((dt.getTime() - start) / 86400000);
      byYear[y][doy] = d;
    });
    var years = Object.keys(byYear).sort();
    var z = [], hover = [];
    years.forEach(function (y) {
      var row = [], hrow = [];
      for (var doy = 0; doy < 366; doy++) {
        var d = byYear[y][doy];
        if (d) {
          row.push(d.count);
          var theme = d.top_theme || "—";
          var stormBadge = d.storm ? " 🌩️ STORM DAY" : "";
          hrow.push(d.day + "<br>" + d.count + " posts (top theme: " + theme + ")" + stormBadge);
        } else {
          row.push(null);
          hrow.push("");
        }
      }
      z.push(row);
      hover.push(hrow);
    });

    var data = [{
      z: z,
      x: Array.from({length: 366}, function (_, i) { return i; }),
      y: years,
      type: "heatmap",
      colorscale: [
        [0,    "#F4ECD8"],
        [0.05, "#E8D5A3"],
        [0.25, "#C9A961"],
        [0.55, "#8B1E3F"],
        [1,    "#0A2540"]
      ],
      hovertext: hover,
      hovertemplate: "%{hovertext}<extra></extra>",
      showscale: true,
      colorbar: { title: "posts", thickness: 12, len: 0.8 }
    }];
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 10, b: 40, l: 50 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: {
        title: "day of year",
        tickmode: "array",
        tickvals: [0, 31, 59, 90, 120, 151, 181, 212, 243, 273, 304, 334],
        ticktext: ["Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr", "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec"],
        tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" }
      },
      yaxis: { autorange: "reversed", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("storm-calendar", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
  });

  // ---------- 4. Sentiment by theme ----------
  fetch("data/sentiment.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (s) {
    var themes = Object.keys(s.by_theme).sort();
    themes.unshift("(overall)");
    var sel = document.getElementById("sentiment-theme");
    themes.forEach(function (t) {
      var o = document.createElement("option");
      o.value = t; o.textContent = t;
      sel.appendChild(o);
    });

    function rolling(series, win) {
      var out = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < series.length; i++) {
        var lo = Math.max(0, i - win + 1);
        var slice = series.slice(lo, i + 1);
        var avg = slice.reduce(function (a, m) { return a + m.mean; }, 0) / slice.length;
        out.push({ month: series[i].month, mean: avg });
      }
      return out;
    }

    function renderTheme(theme) {
      var raw = (theme === "(overall)") ? s.overall : s.by_theme[theme];
      var smoothed = rolling(raw, 3);
      var x = smoothed.map(function (m) { return m.month + "-01"; });
      var y = smoothed.map(function (m) { return m.mean; });
      var data = [
        {
          x: x, y: y, type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
          line: { color: "#0A2540", width: 2 },
          fill: "tozeroy",
          fillcolor: "rgba(201, 169, 97, 0.18)",
          hovertemplate: "%{x|%b %Y}<br>VADER mean: %{y:+.3f}<extra></extra>"
        }
      ];
      var layout = {
        margin: { t: 10, r: 20, b: 40, l: 50 },
        paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        xaxis: { type: "date", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
        yaxis: {
          range: [-1, 1], zeroline: true, zerolinecolor: "#8B1E3F", zerolinewidth: 1.5,
          tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" }
        },
        shapes: [{
          type: "line", x0: x[0], x1: x[x.length - 1], y0: 0, y1: 0,
          line: { color: "#8B1E3F", width: 1, dash: "dot" }
        }]
      };
      Plotly.newPlot("sentiment-chart", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
    }
    sel.addEventListener("change", function () { renderTheme(sel.value); });
    renderTheme("(overall)");
  });

  // ---------- 5. Lexical (CAPS + exclamation) ----------
  fetch("data/lexical.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (l) {
    var x = l.months.map(function (m) { return m.month + "-01"; });
    var caps = l.months.map(function (m) { return m.caps_mean * 100.0; });
    var excl = l.months.map(function (m) { return m.excl_mean; });
    var data = [
      {
        x: x, y: caps, type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
        name: "% CAPS words",
        line: { color: NAVY, width: 2 },
        hovertemplate: "%{x|%b %Y}<br>%{y:.1f}% words ALL-CAPS<extra></extra>"
      },
      {
        x: x, y: excl, type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
        name: "! per 100 chars",
        line: { color: RED, width: 2 },
        yaxis: "y2",
        hovertemplate: "%{x|%b %Y}<br>%{y:.2f} !/100 chars<extra></extra>"
      }
    ];
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 50, b: 40, l: 50 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { type: "date", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { title: "% CAPS words", titlefont: { color: NAVY }, tickfont: { color: NAVY, family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis2: { title: "! per 100 chars", titlefont: { color: RED }, tickfont: { color: RED, family: "Libre Franklin" }, overlaying: "y", side: "right" },
      legend: { orientation: "h", y: -0.18, x: 0.5, xanchor: "center", font: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("lexical-chart", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
  });

  // ---------- 6b. Topic stream graph ----------
  fetch("data/topic_stream.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (s) {
    // Use the existing per-theme color from theme_catalog if exposed; otherwise fall back to a presidential palette cycle.
    var palette = [
      "#0A2540", "#8B1E3F", "#C9A961", "#6E4C7A", "#4E6E58",
      "#8C5E2A", "#3F6E8B", "#7A3030", "#B08030", "#26545A",
      "#5C4F30", "#A03A4A", "#3D5A36", "#5C2C5E", "#1F3A5F",
      "#7E5A1F", "#403C73", "#7A4E2E", "#274A38"
    ];
    var x = s.months.map(function (m) { return m + "-01"; });
    var traces = s.themes.map(function (theme, i) {
      return {
        x: x, y: s.counts[theme],
        name: theme,
        type: "scatter", mode: "lines",
        stackgroup: "one",
        line: { width: 0.4, color: palette[i % palette.length] },
        fillcolor: palette[i % palette.length],
        hovertemplate: "<b>" + theme + "</b><br>%{x|%b %Y}: %{y} posts<extra></extra>"
      };
    });
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 20, b: 40, l: 50 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { type: "date", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { title: "posts per month", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      legend: { orientation: "h", y: -0.18, x: 0.5, xanchor: "center", font: { family: "Libre Franklin", size: 11 } },
      hovermode: "closest"
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("topic-stream", traces, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
  });

  // ---------- 7. TF-IDF distinctive words by year ----------
  fetch("data/tfidf.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (t) {
    var years = t.years;
    // Year strip: a horizontal bar where each cell is a year, click to select.
    var strip = [{
      x: years, y: years.map(function () { return 1; }),
      type: "bar",
      marker: { color: years.map(function () { return GOLD; }), line: { color: NAVY, width: 1 } },
      text: years, textposition: "inside", insidetextanchor: "middle",
      textfont: { color: NAVY, family: "Libre Franklin", size: 13 },
      hovertemplate: "Click to see %{x}<extra></extra>"
    }];
    var stripLayout = {
      margin: { t: 4, r: 0, b: 24, l: 0 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { showticklabels: false, fixedrange: true },
      yaxis: { showticklabels: false, range: [0, 1.05], fixedrange: true },
      bargap: 0.04, showlegend: false
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("tfidf-strip", strip, stripLayout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });

    function renderYear(year) {
      var rows = (t.by_year[year] || []).slice().reverse();
      var data = [{
        x: rows.map(function (r) { return r.score; }),
        y: rows.map(function (r) { return r.term; }),
        type: "bar", orientation: "h",
        marker: { color: NAVY },
        hovertemplate: "<b>%{y}</b><br>TF-IDF %{x:.3f}<extra></extra>"
      }];
      var layout = {
        margin: { t: 10, r: 20, b: 40, l: 200 },
        paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
        xaxis: { title: "TF-IDF score (higher = more distinctive to " + year + ")", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
        yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
      };
      Plotly.newPlot("tfidf-bars", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
      // Highlight selected year in the strip
      var colors = years.map(function (y) { return y === year ? RED : GOLD; });
      Plotly.restyle("tfidf-strip", { "marker.color": [colors] });
    }

    document.getElementById("tfidf-strip").on("plotly_click", function (ev) {
      var pt = ev.points && ev.points[0];
      if (pt) renderYear(pt.x);
    });
    // Default: show the most recent year
    renderYear(years[years.length - 1]);
  });

  // ---------- 3. Nickname factory ----------
  fetch("data/nicknames.json").then(function (r) { return r.json(); }).then(function (n) {
    var labels = n.targets.map(function (t) { return t.target; }).reverse();
    var counts = n.targets.map(function (t) { return t.count; }).reverse();
    var colors = n.targets.map(function (t) { return t.sentiment === "good" ? GOLD : RED; }).reverse();

    var data = [{
      x: counts, y: labels,
      type: "bar", orientation: "h",
      marker: { color: colors },
      hovertemplate: "<b>%{y}</b><br>%{x} nickname uses<extra></extra>"
    }];
    var layout = {
      margin: { t: 10, r: 20, b: 40, l: 200 },
      paper_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor: "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      xaxis: { title: "nickname mentions", tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } },
      yaxis: { tickfont: { family: "Libre Franklin" } }
    };
    Plotly.newPlot("nickname-bars", data, layout, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });

    var panel = document.getElementById("nickname-panel");
    var byTarget = {};
    n.targets.forEach(function (t) { byTarget[t.target] = t; });

    document.getElementById("nickname-bars").on("plotly_click", function (ev) {
      var pt = ev.points && ev.points[0];
      if (!pt) return;
      var t = byTarget[pt.y];
      if (!t) return;
      panel.style.display = "block";
      var html = '<div class="title">' + t.target + " — " + t.count + " nickname uses (mostly " + t.sentiment + "):</div>";
      html += '<div class="nickname-surfaces">';
      t.surfaces.forEach(function (s) {
        html += '<span class="surface">' + s.surface + ' <small>×' + s.count + '</small></span>';
      });
      html += '</div>';
      if (t.samples && t.samples.length) {
        html += '<div class="title" style="margin-top:0.6rem;">Samples:</div>';
        t.samples.forEach(function (s) {
          html += '<div class="item"><span class="ts">' + fmtTs(s.ts) + " · " + s.platform + '</span>' + s.text + '</div>';
        });
      }
      panel.innerHTML = html;
      panel.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "nearest" });
    });
  });
})();
</script>
